missing.example: A page is missing from this book.

mission.example: Their mission was to save the village.
mission.example_zh: 他們的任務是拯救村莊。

mob.example: An angry mob gathered in the street.
mob.example_zh: 一群憤怒的暴民聚集在街上。

moist.example: The cake was soft and moist.

moisture.example_zh: 植物需要水分才能生長。

monk.example: The monk lived a quiet life.
monk.example_zh: 那位僧侶過著平靜的生活。

monster.example: The child was afraid of the monster.

monthly.example: We have a monthly class meeting.

moral.example_zh: 那是個關乎道德的決定。

moral.example: The story teaches a good moral.
moral.example_zh: 這個故事教導了一個好道理。

mosquito.example: A mosquito bit me on the arm.
mosquito.example_zh: 一隻蚊子叮了我的手臂。

motel.example: We stayed at a roadside motel.
motel.example_zh: 我們住在路邊的一家汽車旅館。

moth.example: A moth flew toward the light.

multiply.example: Multiply three by four to get twelve.
Bacteria multiply quickly in warm food.
multiply.example_zh: 細菌在溫熱的食物中迅速繁殖。

murder.example: The police solved the murder case.
He was charged with murdering a man.

mushroom.example: We put mushrooms in the soup.

mystery.example: The old house is full of mystery.

naked.example: You can't see germs with the naked eye.

nap.example: I take a short nap after lunch.
The cat napped on the sofa.

napkin.example: She wiped her mouth with a napkin.

native.example: He is a native of Taipei.

navy.example: His brother serves in the navy.

necessity.example: Water is a necessity of life.

necktie.example: He wore a blue necktie to work.
necktie.example_zh: 他打了藍色領帶去上班。

neighborhood.example: We live in a quiet neighborhood.
neighborhood.example_zh: 我們住在一個安靜的社區。

nest.example: The bird built a nest in the tree.

normal.example: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
normal.example_zh: 考試前緊張是很正常的。

novelist.example_zh: 這位小說家寫了十本書。

nun.example: The nun helped the poor in the village.
nun.example_zh: 那位修女幫助村裡的窮人。

oak.example: A tall oak grew in the garden.
oak.example_zh: 花園裡長著一棵高大的橡樹。

observe.example: We observed the stars through a telescope.
observe.example_zh: 我們用望遠鏡觀察星星。
每個人都必須遵守規則。

occasion.example: A wedding is a special occasion.

odd.example: I heard an odd sound at night.
odd.example_zh: 我晚上聽到一個奇怪的聲音。

odd.example: One, three, and five are odd numbers.

omit.example_zh: 別遺漏任何重要的細節。

onto.example: The cat jumped onto the table.

operation.example: The doctor performed a difficult operation.
operation.example_zh: 醫生進行了一場困難的手術。

operation.example: The factory began operation last year.
operation.example_zh: 這家工廠去年開始運作。

opportunity.example: This is a great opportunity to learn.
opportunity.example_zh: 這是個很好的學習機會。

opposite.example_zh: 他們朝相反的方向走去。

opposite.example: The bank is opposite the post office.

optimistic.example: She is optimistic about the future.

oral.example: We have an oral English test today.

organize.example_zh: 她籌辦了一場慈善活動。

organize.example: She organized the books on the shelf.
organize.example_zh: 她把架子上的書整理好。

original.example: This is the original painting, not a copy.

outdoor.example: We enjoy outdoor activities like hiking.
outdoor.example_zh: 我們喜歡像健行這樣的戶外活動。

outdoors.example: The children played outdoors all day.
outdoors.example_zh: 孩子們在戶外玩了一整天。

outer.example: The outer wall is painted white.

outline.example: Write an outline before your essay.
We saw the outline of the mountain.

oven.example: She baked the cake in the oven.

owe.example: I owe my friend ten dollars.

ownership.example: He has ownership of the small shop.
ownership.example_zh: 他擁有這家小店的所有權。
